name: Women's Metal Rectangle Sunglasses - A New Day™ Gold: UV Protection, Impact-Resistant, Recycled Metal Frame
description:
These Metal Rectangle Sunglasses from A New Day™ combine fashion and function to give you the perfect accessory for any outfit. These sunglasses feature a sleek rectangular design with gold frames and brown lenses for a chic look that's perfect for your going-out attire. Made from recycled metal, the UV-protection lenses help keep your eyes shielded from the sun, making them perfect for a sunny day spent at the beach or pool.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
